label: add lateral drift — vanishing point wanders (constant, time-driven, never audio)
note: Nick chose lateral drift over roll / faster-scroll / fold-evolution. Drift applied in NDC BEFORE the aspect squeeze so the wander is isotropic on screen.

operations.before: move_002 shader — no uDrift uniform; main() opened with `vec2 uv = vUV.st * 2.0 - 1.0;` immediately followed by `uv.x *= 720.0 / 1280.0;` with no drift block between
